느헤미야 12:1.content: Now these are the priests and the Levites who went up with Zerubbabel the son of Shealtiel, and Jeshua: Seraiah, Jeremiah, Ezra,

느헤미야 12:7.content: Sallu, Amok, Hilkiah, and Jedaiah. These were the chiefs of the priests and of their brothers in the days of Jeshua.

느헤미야 12:8.content: Moreover the Levites: Jeshua, Binnui, Kadmiel, Sherebiah, Judah, and Mattaniah, who was over the thanksgiving, he and his brothers.

느헤미야 12:9.content: Also Bakbukiah and Unno, their brothers, were close to them according to their offices.

느헤미야 12:10.content: Jeshua became the father of Joiakim, and Joiakim became the father of Eliashib, and Eliashib became the father of Joiada,

느헤미야 12:11.content: and Joiada became the father of Jonathan, and Jonathan became the father of Jaddua.

느헤미야 12:12.content: In the days of Joiakim were priests, heads of fathers’ households: of Seraiah, Meraiah; of Jeremiah, Hananiah;

느헤미야 12:13.content: of Ezra, Meshullam; of Amariah, Jehohanan;

느헤미야 12:14.content: of Malluchi, Jonathan; of Shebaniah, Joseph;

느헤미야 12:15.content: of Harim, Adna; of Meraioth, Helkai;

느헤미야 12:16.content: of Iddo, Zechariah; of Ginnethon, Meshullam;

느헤미야 12:17.content: of Abijah, Zichri; of Miniamin, of Moadiah, Piltai;

느헤미야 12:18.content: of Bilgah, Shammua; of Shemaiah, Jehonathan;

느헤미야 12:19.content: and of Joiarib, Mattenai; of Jedaiah, Uzzi;

느헤미야 12:20.content: of Sallai, Kallai; of Amok, Eber;

느헤미야 12:21.content: of Hilkiah, Hashabiah; of Jedaiah, Nethanel.

느헤미야 12:22.content: As for the Levites, in the days of Eliashib, Joiada, and Johanan, and Jaddua, there were recorded the heads of fathers’ households; also the priests, in the reign of Darius the Persian.

느헤미야 12:23.content: The sons of Levi, heads of fathers’ households, were written in the book of the chronicles, even until the days of Johanan the son of Eliashib.

느헤미야 12:24.content: The chiefs of the Levites: Hashabiah, Sherebiah, and Jeshua the son of Kadmiel, with their brothers close to them, to praise and give thanks, according to the commandment of David the man of God, watch next to watch.

느헤미야 12:25.content: Mattaniah, and Bakbukiah, Obadiah, Meshullam, Talmon, Akkub, were gatekeepers keeping the watch at the storehouses of the gates.

느헤미야 12:26.content: These were in the days of Joiakim the son of Jeshua, the son of Jozadak, and in the days of Nehemiah the governor, and of Ezra the priest and scribe.

느헤미야 12:27.content: At the dedication of the wall of Jerusalem, they sought the Levites out of all their places, to bring them to Jerusalem, to keep the dedication with gladness, both with giving thanks, and with singing, with cymbals, stringed instruments, and with harps.

느헤미야 12:28.content: The sons of the singers gathered themselves together, both out of the plain around Jerusalem and from the villages of the Netophathites;

느헤미야 12:29.content: also from Beth Gilgal, and out of the fields of Geba and Azmaveth: for the singers had built themselves villages around Jerusalem.

느헤미야 12:30.content: The priests and the Levites purified themselves; and they purified the people, and the gates, and the wall.

느헤미야 12:31.content: Then I brought up the princes of Judah on the wall, and appointed two great companies who gave thanks and went in procession. One went on the right hand on the wall toward the dung gate;

느헤미야 12:32.content: and after them went Hoshaiah, with half of the princes of Judah,

느헤미야 12:35.content: and some of the priests’ sons with trumpets: Zechariah the son of Jonathan, the son of Shemaiah, the son of Mattaniah, the son of Micaiah, the son of Zaccur, the son of Asaph;

느헤미야 12:36.content: and his brothers, Shemaiah, Azarel, Milalai, Gilalai, Maai, Nethanel, Judah, and Hanani, with the musical instruments of David the man of God; and Ezra the scribe was before them.

느헤미야 12:37.content: By the spring gate, and straight before them, they went up by the stairs of David’s city, at the ascent of the wall, above David’s house, even to the water gate eastward.

느헤미야 12:38.content: The other company of those who gave thanks went to meet them, and I after them, with the half of the people, on the wall, above the tower of the furnaces, even to the wide wall,

느헤미야 12:39.content: and above the gate of Ephraim, and by the old gate, and by the fish gate, and the tower of Hananel, and the tower of Hammeah, even to the sheep gate: and they stood still in the gate of the guard.

느헤미야 12:40.content: So the two companies of those who gave thanks in God’s house stood, and I, and the half of the rulers with me;

느헤미야 12:41.content: and the priests, Eliakim, Maaseiah, Miniamin, Micaiah, Elioenai, Zechariah, and Hananiah, with trumpets;

느헤미야 12:42.content: and Maaseiah, Shemaiah, Eleazar, Uzzi, Jehohanan, Malchijah, Elam, and Ezer. The singers sang loud, with Jezrahiah their overseer.

느헤미야 12:43.content: They offered great sacrifices that day, and rejoiced; for God had made them rejoice with great joy; and the women and the children also rejoiced; so that the joy of Jerusalem was heard even far away.

느헤미야 12:44.content: On that day, men were appointed over the rooms for the treasures, for the wave offerings, for the first fruits, and for the tithes, to gather into them, according to the fields of the cities, the portions appointed by the law for the priests and Levites; for Judah rejoiced for the priests and for the Levites who waited.

느헤미야 12:45.content: They performed the duty of their God, and the duty of the purification, and so did the singers and the gatekeepers, according to the commandment of David, and of Solomon his son.

느헤미야 12:46.content: For in the days of David and Asaph of old there was a chief of the singers, and songs of praise and thanksgiving to God.

느헤미야 12:47.content: All Israel in the days of Zerubbabel, and in the days of Nehemiah, gave the portions of the singers and the gatekeepers, as every day required; and they set apart that which was for the Levites; and the Levites set apart that which was for the sons of Aaron.
